entries.definition: in the phrase 'on the razzle' — going out to drink and party wildly (British informal)
entries.exampleSentence: It's his birthday on Friday, so the lads are going out on the razzle.

entries.definition: in 'razzle-dazzle' — a showy, exciting, or confusing display designed to impress or distract
entries.exampleSentence: The marketing campaign was all razzle-dazzle with very little substance behind it.
